The Proposal: -

Officers / staff concerned using private mobile phones while preparing e-currency.
During the discussion of the Legislative Council Starred Question No. 4787 regarding the action to be taken, Mr. Chief Minister
Mr. "Regarding e-challan collection, the person must use technology in this regard.

A study group of senior level officers will also be set up for the study.

para_trans: The scope of the study group will be as follows.
1) Technology-based measures for e-currency recovery and penal punishment
By studying the methods used in other countries and states regarding doing
To make recommendations and suggest policy matters to the Government.
2) Misuse of e-currency by police to meet revenue growth targets
Suggest measures that won't work.
3. The Study Group shall report to the Government within three months with recommendations on the above matter.
be submitted.
